title: cyclosorus ovatus
intro: Cyclosorus ovatus, also known as the Chinese scolopendrium or maidenhair fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Cyclosorus ovatus include its potential to treat conditions such as hypertension, fever, and rheumatism, as well as its ability to improve cardiovascular health and boost the immune system. In traditional Chinese medicine, Cyclosorus ovatus is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and its leaves can also be dried and used as an herbal supplement or added to salads for their nutritional benefits.
